evals.prompt: Import these normalized records into my Zotero library, then trigger full-text retrieval for all newly created items and report item IDs and failures.
evals.expected_output: Structured action results with per-item status, created item IDs, and full-text retrieval outcomes.
assertions: Response includes per-item status entries and no fabricated item keys
At least one import action result contains an item_id when import succeeds
Full-text retrieval step reports success, skipped, or error explicitly per item

evals.prompt: For item keys A1B2C3 and D4E5F6, fetch attachment lists and return extracted text previews when available.
evals.expected_output: Attachment-level results with explicit handling for missing or non-text attachments.
assertions: Attachment listing response includes content type metadata for each attachment
Missing or inaccessible attachments are reported as skipped or error, not silently omitted
Attachment text output includes a bounded preview field when text is available

evals.prompt: Apply tags [radical, mechanism, to-cite] to selected items, move them into Mechanistic precedents, and create short notes from supplied summaries.
evals.expected_output: Confirmed mutation actions with clear success and partial-failure reporting.
assertions: Tagging response confirms all requested tags or explains which failed
Collection move response includes resolved collection identifier or explicit failure reason
Note creation returns a newly created note item key when successful
